title: hieracium dipterum
intro: Hieracium dipterum, also known as Devil's-bit scabious, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family, native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers are used in herbal medicine, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Hieracium dipterum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
